title: Mallikarjuna Temple
tagline: Mallikarjuna Temple — spiritual town of Andhra Pradesh

overview.short: Mallikarjuna Swamy Temple or Srisailam Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deities Shiva and Parvati, located at Srisailam, Nandyal district in the Indian state of Andhra Pra
overview.description: Mallikarjuna Swamy Temple or Srisailam Temple is a Hindu temple dedicated to the deities Shiva and Parvati, located at Srisailam, Nandyal district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is significant to the Hindu sects of both Shaivism and Shaktism as this temple is referred to as one of the twelve Jyotirlingas of Shiva and as one of the fifty two Shakta pithas, centres of the Hindu goddess. Shiva is worshiped as Mallikarjuna and is represented by the lingam. His consort Parvati is depicted as Bhramaramba.

topPlaces.name: Srisailamgudem Devasthanam
topPlaces.description: Srisailamgudem Devasthanam is a village in Nandyal district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.

topPlaces.name: Srisailam mandal
topPlaces.description: Srisailam mandal is a mandal in Nandyal district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is under the administration of new formed Atmakur revenue division with its headquarters located at Srisailam Project (RFC) Township.

topPlaces.name: Srisailam
topPlaces.description: Srisailam is a census town in Nandyal district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the mandal headquarters of Srisailam mandal in Atmakur revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Krishnagiri, Telangana
topPlaces.description: Krishnagiri (Eegalapenta) is a village of Nagarkurnool district in the Indian state of Telangana. It is near to Srisailam Dam and the temple of Srisailam.

topPlaces.name: Srisailam Dam
topPlaces.description: The Srisailam Dam is a gravity dam built on the confluence of Tungabhadra River and Krishna River. Its hydroelectric power station is India's 2nd largest by capacity.

topPlaces.name: Telangana tunnel collapse
topPlaces.description: On 22 February 2025, a significant tunnel collapse occurred in the Nagarkurnool district of Telangana, India, within the Srisailam Left Bank Canal (SLBC) project. The collapse trapped eight engineers and laborers inside the tunnel.

topPlaces.name: Brahmagiri, Telangana
topPlaces.description: Bramhagiri is a village of Nagarkurnool district in the Indian state of Telangana. It is near to Srisailam Dam and the temple of Srisailam.

items.note: Srisailamgudem Devasthanam is a village in Nandyal district in the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh.

Srisailam mandal is a mandal in Nandyal district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is under the administration of new formed Atmakur revenue division with its headquarters located at Srisailam Project (RFC) Township.
Srisailam is a census town in Nandyal district of the Indian state of Andhra Pradesh. It is the mandal headquarters of Srisailam mandal in Atmakur revenue division.
Krishnagiri (Eegalapenta) is a village of Nagarkurnool district in the Indian state of Telangana. It is near to Srisailam Dam and the temple of Srisailam.
The Srisailam Dam is a gravity dam built on the confluence of Tungabhadra River and Krishna River. Its hydroelectric power station is India's 2nd largest by capacity.

On 22 February 2025, a significant tunnel collapse occurred in the Nagarkurnool district of Telangana, India, within the Srisailam Left Bank Canal (SLBC) project. The collapse trapped eight engineers and laborers inside the tunnel.
Bramhagiri is a village of Nagarkurnool district in the Indian state of Telangana. It is near to Srisailam Dam and the temple of Srisailam.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Mallikarjuna Temple?
faq.a: The best time to visit Mallikarjuna Temple is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Mallikarjuna Temple?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Kurnool Airport (96 km) and the nearest railway station is Kacheguda (Hyderabad) (152 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Mallikarjuna Temple?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Mallikarjuna Temple at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Mallikarjuna Temple?
faq.a: Stays in Mallikarjuna Temple start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Mallikarjuna Temple?
faq.a: The top attractions are Srisailamgudem Devasthanam, Srisailam mandal, Srisailam, Krishnagiri, Telangana, Srisailam Dam.
